title: Section 181
content: Whoever, drives a motor vehicle in contravention of section 3 or section 4 shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which may extend to three months, or with fine 1[of five thousand rupees], or with both.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 63, ibid., for "which may extend to five hundred rupees" (w.e.f. 1-9-2019).
